privileged_info_summary: The task configures grade letter boundaries for the Nursing Fundamentals (NUR301) course with 10 letter grades: A=93%, A-=90%, B+=87%, B=83%, B-=80%, C+=77%, C=73%, C-=70%, D=60%, F=0%. These boundaries are verified to be exactly as specified in the task.json metadata. The verifier checks boundaries with a tolerance of ±0.5 percentage points. All data is synthetic and specific to this task environment.
